betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Dimensional Science: Creating Worlds§f

§aPlay God and construct customized, pocket dimensions tailored to your base's exact needs!§f

The §9RFTools Dimensions§f mod allows you to write, construct, and sustain entirely new dimensions. By registering world parameters onto digital templates and powering massive build arrays, you can teleport into custom dimensions to extract rare ores, harness massive energy reservoirs, or build sprawling factories.

§6Dimension Construction Steps§f:
1. §bEnscribe the Tab§f: Place an §bEmpty Dimension Tab§f inside the §9Dimension Enscriber§f. To make a random, default dimension, simply hit write without adding any dimlets.
2. §bConstruct the World§f: Place the resulting §bRealized Dimension Tab§f inside the §9Dimension Builder§f.
3. §bPower the Array§f: The Dimension Builder requires massive streams of energy to build and sustain the world. It has a massive capacity of §e10,000,000 RF§f and can receive up to §a50,000 RF/tick§f.
4. §bTeleport§f: Set up a §bMatter Transmitter§f at your base and a §bMatter Receiver§f inside the dimension to establish a wireless wormhole link, allowing you to teleport into your new world!

§6Sustaining Dimensions§f:
Custom dimensions require continuous power to remain stable. The richer the dimension (more dimlets, rare resources, special terrain), the more RF per tick it consumes to stay open. Plan your energy infrastructure around your most expensive dimension's draw rate before leaving it running unattended.

§6Resource Extraction§f:
Once inside, you can mine rare ores, pump infinite fluids, or build isolated factories in a private dimension that other players cannot reach. When you exit, the dimension persists as long as the Dimension Builder remains powered and active.

§eTip§f: Always pair your Dimension Builder with an §bActivity Probe§f and a §bPhased Field Generator§f. The probe halts power consumption when nobody is online, and the PFG protects you from instant death if the world collapses during a brownout.
